title: THE SPARROWS SCRIPT
body:
🕊️ The Sparrow’s Script (v1.0.4)  
A corrupted tale buried in silence... until now.  
  
Enter a world twisted by forgotten code and haunted whispers. The Sparrow’s Script transforms Minecraft into a surreal horror experience filled with eerie biomes, haunted structures, and malicious entities. Nothing is what it seems — and the deeper you dig, the more broken the world becomes.  
  
Features:  
  
🌲 New corrupted biomes like Dead Woods and Deadhell  
👁️ Terrifying mobs like Mimcers and Scripteds  
🧠 Creepy timed messages and player-reactive events  
⚫ Unique mechanics like blindness, entity aggression triggers, and world decay
